projects.title: Auto YT Publisher
projects.summary: A React and TypeScript workflow for discovering trends, preparing content assets, and moving YouTube videos toward publishing.
highlights: Trend discovery and publishing pipeline interface
Direct GitHub link instead of a separate project page

projects.title: Desi Jarvis Assistant
projects.summary: A modular desktop assistant prototype that listens for commands, automates system tasks, and can be extended with plugins.
highlights: Wake-word, reminders, and desktop automation ideas
